ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game was played */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the game within the season */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee of the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head coach of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* City and state where the team is based */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team plays in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the play is part of */,
  "drive_index" INTEGER /* Index of the drive within the game */,
  "play_index" INTEGER /* Index of the play within the drive */,
  "offense_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offensive team during the play */,
  "defense_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defensive team during the play */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter the play occurred in */,
  "clock" TEXT /* Game clock time when the play started */,
  "wallclock" TEXT /* Wallclock time when the play occurred */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., Rush, Pass, Kickoff) */,
  "down" INTEGER /* Down number during the play */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance to go for a first down */,
  "yard_line" INTEGER /* Starting yard line of the play */,
  "yards_gained" INTEGER /* Yards gained or lost during the play */,
  "end_yard_line" INTEGER /* Ending yard line after the play */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the play */,
  "play_result" TEXT /* Result of the play (e.g., touchdown, incomplete pass, sack) */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Any penalties that occurred during the play */,
  "play_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the play */,
  "play_type_detail" TEXT /* More detailed information about the play type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_offense_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_defense_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("defense_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drives" (
  "drive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drive */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the drive is part of */,
  "drive_index" INTEGER /* Index of the drive within the game */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time the drive started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time the drive ended */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the drive (e.g., touchdown, field goal, turnover) */,
  "drive_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the drive */,
  "starting_field_position" INTEGER /* Starting field position of the drive */,
  "end_field_position" INTEGER /* Ending field position of the drive */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., offensive, defensive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is on */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "position_detail" TEXT /* More detailed information about the player's position */,
  "rookie_year" INTEGER /* Year the player started playing professionally */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game's statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistics are for */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "final_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "penalties_count" INTEGER /* Number of penalties */,
  "penalties_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards lost due to penalties */,
  "third_down_efficiency" TEXT /* Third-down conversion rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_stats" (
  "play_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play's statistics */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play the statistics are for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the play */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., rushing yards, passing yards) */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "play_result" TEXT /* Result of the play (e.g., touchdown, incomplete pass) */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Any penalties associated with the play */,
  "play_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_stats_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drive_stats" (
  "drive_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drive's statistics */,
  "drive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drive the statistics are for */,
  "plays_count" INTEGER /* Number of plays in the drive */,
  "yards_gained" INTEGER /* Total yards gained during the drive */,
  "drive_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the drive */,
  "starting_field_position" INTEGER /* Starting field position of the drive */,
  "end_field_position" INTEGER /* Ending field position of the drive */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., offensive, defensive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drive_stats_drive_id FOREIGN KEY ("drive_id") REFERENCES drives ("drive_id")
)
